event_comments: There were five items left at coat drop after the event, these will be at the info tent at the next meet, or contact info@cascadeoc.org to claim. COC Club Jacket (S), Blue Rain Jacket with f5 and “el nino” logos, kids navy and yellow Patagonia fleece, black Patagonia puff with facebook logo (L), black Patagonia puff (S). _Any Lost and Found items from this season not claimed after the Championship event on 2/18 will be donated._
cumulative_event_comments:
Thank you to all of our volunteers!
